name: California Academy of Sciences
description: The California Academy of Sciences is a renowned scientific and educational institution in San Francisco's Golden Gate Park, combining an aquarium, planetarium, rainforest, and natural history museum

name: Japanese Tea Garden
description: The Japanese Tea Garden in San Francisco, California, is a popular feature of Golden Gate Park, originally built as part of a sprawling World's Fair, the California Midwinter International Exposition of 1894.

name: Hamon Observation Tower
description: The Hamon Observation Tower is a free, 144-foot-tall public viewing deck on the 9th floor of San Francisco's de Young Museum in Golden Gate Park. It features floor-to-ceiling glass walls providing stunning 360-degree views of Golden Gate Park.

name: Alcatraz Ticket, Ferry, & Self-Guided App
description: Explore San Francisco's mysteries with this entry ticket and self-guided app tour to Alcatraz. Explore the infamous island prison, ride a ferry across the bay, and learn the site's history.

name: Alcatraz Jailhouse Night Tour
description: Embark on an exhilarating journey through history with this Alcatraz highlights tour. Step foot on the infamous island that once contained America's most notorious criminals at night.

name: Alcatraz, Muir Woods & Sausalito 2-Day Tour
description: Explore Alcatraz Island on a tour of the notorious former federal prison. The next day, escape the crowds and explore Muir Woods.

name: Powell-Hyde Cable Car
description: The Powell-Hyde Cable Car in San Francisco travels between Powell & Market and Fisherman’s Wharf, featuring iconic views of Lombard Street, Alcatraz, and the Bay. Rides take around 16–20 minutes.

name: Museum of 3D Illusions
description: The Museum of 3D Illusions features over 40 interactive 3D murals that make you part of the art. Step inside mind-bending scenes, snap unforgettable photos, and create content that’s as fun as it is shareable.

name: Vantigo Tours
description: Vantigo tours will give you the best tour of San Francisco from a local tour guide in a fully restored vintage Volkswagen bus. Jump in one of our classic VW Vans (Lillie & Harvey) and experience all the Bay Area has to offer
